content:
A Creative Response (Rewrite a Passage from Sartre)
A secret betrayal path—students can trade information for XP.


📜 Rules for Hidden Choices
✔ Players do not know if others have received different choices.
✔ Some options are only visible to players with specific archetypes or XP levels.
✔ Some secret choices require a student to “activate” them by performing a specific act in class.

✅ Why This Works:
• Creates an immersive, unpredictable social experiment.
• Encourages students to form alliances or betray others.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 279 (chunk 279/555)
